+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-29100-mach-o-file-but-is-an-incompatible-architecture-have-x86-64-need-arm6",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture (have 'x86_64', need 'arm64e')) on apple M1 chip",
+    "description": "(mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture (have 'x86_64', need 'arm64e')) on apple M1 chip. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n`dlopen(/Users/vikram/.rbenv/versions/2.6.5/lib/ruby/gems/2.6.0/gems/grpc-1.38.0-universal-darwin/src/ruby/lib/grpc/2.6/grpc_c.bundle, 0x0009): tried:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture (have…",
+        "description": "Custom strip invalidates the signature, caused the arm64-darwin gem failed to run on M1 macs.\nError in mac console: `Exception Type:        EXC_BAD_ACCESS (SIGKILL (Code Signature Invalid))`\n\nWarning in gem build log:\n```\n# linking shared-object grpc/grpc_c.bundle\n# Stripping grpc_c.bundle\n#\n```yaml\n# linking shared-object grpc/grpc_c.bundle\n# Stripping grpc_c.bundle\n# /opt/osxcross/target/bin/aarch64-apple-darwin20.2-strip: warning: changes being made to the file will invalidate the code signature in: /Users/jeff/work/ruby/grpc/tmp/arm64-darwin/grpc_c/3.2.0/grpc_c.bundle\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Custom strip invalidates the signature, caused the arm64-darwin gem failed to run on M1 macs.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# linking shared-object grpc/grpc_c.bundle\n# Stripping grpc_c.bundle\n# /opt/osxcross/target/bin/aarch64-apple-darwin20.2-strip: warning: changes being made to the file will invalidate the code signature in: /Users/jeff/work/ruby/grpc/tmp/arm64-darwin/grpc_c/3.2.0/grpc_c.bundle"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
